info.title: AutoDocX
info.description:
An automative tool that automates the manual work of compiling and executing a c++ program , taking its screenshot
        and adding it into a (.docx) file - usually used for c++ programming assignments submissions.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A command line tool that can automate the manual work of adding the outputs of your c++ program into a wordFile

commands.name: add
commands.description: subcommand to add filePath to autodocx.

arguments.name: FilePath
arguments.description: Argument to add filePath to autodocx.

arguments.name: FileOutputHeading
arguments.description: Argument to specify heading of output in word file. [default: default]

commands.name: update
commands.description: subcommand to update an output in the wordFile.

arguments.name: OldFileName
arguments.description: Argument to add old file path that would be searched in the provided wordFile to be update

arguments.name: NewFileName
arguments.description: Argument to add new file path to be updated with the old file

commands.name: remove
commands.description: subcommand to remove an output in the wordFile.

arguments.name: FilePath
arguments.description: Argument to add filePath to autodocx.
